Bruh
looking good, I use something similiar in Arc 2
deemed the utility of GRamona a bit better for me than crit from Tinct, but I'd imagine these's an argument for either
(my argument is I don't have Gramona :)  )
Any tips on how to play it?
you do want a life drain on one of the units for keyflare gen, not using Kath's posse/getting a fast rouse can hurt you a bit

pretty much just sweep through your deck with Kath, use Horla's stances and vuln/weak as necessary, Loom with Arachne to gather stacks and save exalts of Tinct/Horla for a bursts(make sure to check Kath to make sure you're not overcapping on crit with the exalts, can happen sometimes depending on the relics)
you want to cycle as many hyperflares as possible, so that posse every turn and Kath exalt as often as possible to get her cards in hand helps a lot

don't really know what the best rouse order is for story stages, usually not worth in normal fights, in elites and bosses it's a dice roll whether Kath or Arachne gets the first rouse depending on how many pursuit stacks I have available and how much aliemus the units are sitting on, you'll get a feel for it as you play it
That's really helpful, thanks
Do you just use arachne pursuits when weaver stacks are full?
just kinda vibe exalt with her most of the time, you have the cap of pursuit stacks increased from 3 to 5, someone who uses E3 would have to chime in how that changes her playstyle
I'll go into burst with her if either I'm about to go ultra and have pursuit stacks or can annihilate eternal loom to get 4-5 pursuits under her exalt by refilling the stacks
her rouse allows you to select a specific card out of the ultra bar
I see,thanks
e3 just lets you prep more before burst
and makes numbers bigger
the playstyle is the same

Tawil and Hameln are your easy Chaos keyflare replacements for Ramona.

Thais and Aigis are the core for every Caro comp in the game, and Horla can go on any team. You can't really put those three with Casiah though; it should work if you pull Jenkin. 

You can run Lotan until you get some DPS. The four purple rarity units are good enough that you don't really feel held back for a long time.

Ramona to Hameln
<:1cocoCOZY:1404578895436578826> okok thankyou
I dont know about Tawil, if im not wrong its high investment

Strictly speaking, you can throw a bunch of keyflare on any unit in the game and end up with a keyflare unit; Tawil just has the bonus energy on using her exalt. Tawil's high investment strategy revolves around essentially playing only her cards and nothing else.

Hameln has a 3 cost that puts two insights in your hand, so you get 3 arithmetica worth of key energy and only spend 1 arithmetica, or save it for later. Plus, if you don't have the arithmetica to spare, you can just play it anyway for ramp. Aigis works well for the same reason, she has a refund on her 3 cost. Great keyflare units are generally low impact on your arithmetica or extremely high return for that expenditure.

also what does that resetting pyramid works
use it on a standard awakener to reset them and instead of say, e2 faint you get e0 faint and 2 items that let you pick any standard awakener (or no faint and 3 items)

any standard
okay tysm for your help
+pyramid

This item is called **Origin Of Time**, it provides two main benefits:

**Full Refund**: Recovers all XP and materials you invested in the character you use it on.

**Duplicate Conversion**: Only for Standard Awakeners (not for Limited in the Standard pool or the starting SR Awakeners), converts all additional copies into Standard "selectors," which can subsequently be used to obtain or duplicate other Standard Awakeners of your choice (not Limited in Standard).

This process is also applicable to **Standard Wheels** (except the Limited in the Standard pool).

It is primarily obtained from the developers through special in-game mail during specific events, such as anniversaries or major updates. It is used for re-allocating resources to build a better team.
it's valid for another 4 months or so though, so I wouldn't rush into using it <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>

They are real nice if you are starting out and keep getting the same character again and again on your standard rolls, like when I started and got Uvhash to +10 without getting ANY Agrippa, so you can then turn them into an e0 and then have a ton of standard selectors.
You can even use the selectors to get that character back up to E3 or OE if you want them there and then use the rest to get things you don't have
